title: Remove login requirement for form submissions & style tagline

requirements.summary: Remove Internet Identity authentication requirement from all public-facing form submissions (Contact form, Estimate Calculator, Chatbot query submission). Authentication remains required only for admin panel access.
acceptanceCriteria: A user who is not logged in can submit the Contact form successfully
A user who is not logged in can submit the Estimate Calculator form successfully
A user who is not logged in can submit a query via the Chatbot form successfully
The admin panel still requires Internet Identity login to access
Backend actor accepts anonymous calls for submitQueryForm, submitContactForm, and submitCalculatorLead

file_operations.description: Remove the Internet Identity authentication requirement before form submission. Allow anonymous users to submit the contact form by removing the login check and using the anonymous actor from useActor. Update UI to remove login-related messaging and enable the submit button for all users.

Remove the Internet Identity authentication requirement before form submission. Allow anonymous users to submit calculator leads by removing the login check and using the anonymous actor from useActor. Update UI to remove login-related messaging and enable form submission for all users.

Remove the Internet Identity authentication requirement before query form submission. Allow anonymous users to submit queries by removing the login check and using the anonymous actor from useActor. Update UI to remove login button/prompt from the query submission flow while keeping other chatbot functionality intact.

Update the mutation hooks for submitContactForm, submitQueryForm, and calculateEstimate to work with both authenticated and anonymous actors. Ensure these mutations do not require an authenticated actor and can execute using the anonymous actor from useActor.

requirements.summary: Style the Hero section tagline 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' to be big, bold, and orange in color.
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' is displayed in a large font size
The text is bold (font-weight bold or semibold)

file_operations.description: Update the tagline text 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' styling to use large font size (text-4xl or text-5xl), bold font weight (font-bold or font-semibold), and orange color (using Tailwind orange classes like text-orange-500 or text-orange-600). Ensure the tagline remains visually prominent within the Hero section layout.
